tagline: Predict bills before they disrupt life.

designSystem.style: Dark fintech dashboard with teal primary accents, risk-coded color states (green/amber/red), glassmorphism card surfaces, subtle radial gradients, and data-forward typography hierarchy

screens: Forecast — 30-day cash flow bar chart, financial weather banner with risk score, upcoming bills timeline
Alerts — Categorized smart alerts (urgent/caution/green-light) with timing-based action buttons
Simulate — What-if purchase simulator with quick scenario presets and risk assessment results
Insights — Subscription radar with collision detection, monthly overview, spending pattern cards
Profile — Paycheck settings, connected bank accounts, notification preference toggles
